chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. Cr.B.A.No.817 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on MA-8424/2024 2. For orders on office objection 3. For orders on MA-8425/2024 4. For hearing of main case. 24-07-2024 Mr. Tahir Nisar Rajput advocate along with applicant. Agha Faisal, J. Urgency granted. (2,3&4) The applicant seeks protective bail, in respect of F.I.R. G-18 of 2019, registered on 15.04.2019 before P.S. ACE Jamshoro, pertaining to offence/s under Section/s 409, 420, 467, 468, 477-A, 218, 34 PPC read with section 5 Act-II of 1947. 2. Upon repeated queries, it was disclosed that the applicant had filed Criminal Bail Application 1190 of 2024, which was granted vide order dated 09.07.2024. The applicant never submitted before the learned trial Court pursuant to the aforementioned order and more importantly this order has not been included with the present criminal bail application. 3. There is no statutory or vested right to obtain protective bail and it is a creation of common law. In the very least the bonafides of the applicant need to be prima facie demonstrated, however, in the present circumstances it does not appear to be so. The benefit of protective bail was already granted to the applicant two weeks’ ago and he admittedly did not comply with the order and did not submit before the trial court. Repetition of the protective bail could not be justified by the counsel before this Court. Criminal bail application is found to be devoid of merit hence dismissed in limine. Judge Ahmed/Pa
